name: Potato and Leek Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of the butter and oil. Add the leeks, onion, and garlic and sauté until soft.
2. Add the potatoes and leftover vegetables and cook until the potatoes are lightly browned. Remove from the skillet and place the potato mixture into a medium bowl. Add cheese and cilantro to the bowl, toss, and set aside.
3. In another small bowl, combine eggs, cream, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper and whisk until blended. Pour over the potato/leek mixture.
4. In the empty skillet, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter. Pour in the potato/egg mixture and cook slowly over low heat, piercing the top with a fork and gently lifting the bottom. Continue cooking until the bottom is brown and set.
5. Slide the omelet onto a dinner plate, invert the plate with the omelet back into the skillet, and cook the remaining omelet side until brown. Serve with salsa.
